summary: Iteration 25: Supplier Admin Dashboard (Leveranciersbeheer) - All features tested and working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working correctly including CRUD operations, filters, search, and stats.
seed_data_creation: 5 seeded suppliers with flows migrated (Nice Benelux, Ubiquiti, Sanitec Recreatie, Adyen Payments, Van Loon Verlichting)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested Supplier Admin Dashboard (Leveranciersbeheer). All backend APIs working: GET /api/suppliers (with optional flow= filter), GET /api/suppliers/stats, POST /api/suppliers, PUT /api/suppliers/{id}, DELETE /api/suppliers/{id}. Frontend: FlowSelector has 6 cards including admin-suppliers. SupplierAdmin panel at activeFlow='admin-suppliers' shows stats bar (Total, Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience, Verified), supplier list with flow badges, filter buttons, search field. CRUD operations all working. Key testids: supplier-admin, add-supplier-btn, supplier-search, filter-all, filter-recreatie, filter-chalet, filter-fec, supplier-row-{id}, edit-{id}, delete-{id}, supplier-form, form-name, form-save, form-cancel, select-{flowId}, select-{categoryId}, status-{statusId}.

backend_apis: GET /api/suppliers - returns all suppliers with flows field (16 tests)
POST /api/suppliers - creates supplier with flows array
Seeded suppliers have flows migrated correctly
frontend_ui: Stats bar shows Total, Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience, Verified counts
Each supplier row shows name, status badge, flow badges, categories count
Click + Leverancier toevoegen opens form with all fields
Form has multi-select for flows (recreatie, chalet, fec)
Form has multi-select for categories (14 options)
Form has status selection (Verified, Compatible, Basis)
Click edit icon opens form pre-filled with supplier data
Click delete icon removes supplier after confirmation
Expand supplier row shows contact details, logistics, categories, flows
Filter buttons (Alle, Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience) filter the list
Search field filters by name, address, category

api_test_results.list_suppliers: PASS - Returns all suppliers with flows field
api_test_results.filter_recreatie: PASS - Returns only suppliers with recreatie flow
api_test_results.filter_chalet: PASS - Returns only suppliers with chalet flow
api_test_results.filter_fec: PASS - Returns only suppliers with fec flow
api_test_results.create_supplier: PASS - Creates supplier with flows array
api_test_results.delete_supplier: PASS - Deletes supplier and returns 404 on re-fetch
api_test_results.get_supplier: PASS - Returns specific supplier by ID
api_test_results.seeded_data: PASS - 5 suppliers with correct flows migrated

ui_test_results.flow_selector_6_cards: PASS - All 6 cards visible including Leveranciersbeheer
ui_test_results.supplier_admin_panel: PASS - Panel loads with stats and supplier list
ui_test_results.add_supplier_form: PASS - Form opens with all fields, multi-selects work
ui_test_results.edit_supplier: PASS - Form pre-fills with existing data
ui_test_results.expand_row: PASS - Shows contact, logistics, categories, flows
